---
title: "`r params$title`"
subtitle: "`r params$subtitle`"
author: "`r params$author`"
date: "`r params$date`"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: "Contents"
    css: eri_report.css
params:
  title: "ERI Report"
  subtitle: ""
  author: ""
  date: ""
  params_rds: ""
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
sections <- if (nzchar(params$params_rds) && file.exists(params$params_rds)) {
  readRDS(params$params_rds)
} else {
  list()
}
```

```{r render-sections, results='asis'}
for (s in sections) {
  if (!is.null(s$heading) && nzchar(s$heading)) {
    cat("\n## ", s$heading, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  if (!is.null(s$text) && nzchar(s$text)) {
    cat(s$text, "\n\n")
  }
  if (!is.null(s$table_html)) {
    cat(s$table_html, "\n\n")
  }
  if (!is.null(s$figure_b64)) {
    cat(
      sprintf('<img src="%s" style="max-width:100%%;"/>\n\n', s$figure_b64)
    )
  }
}
```

---

<footer style="font-size:0.8em; color:#888; margin-top:2em;">
Generated by erifunctions · The Carter Center
</footer>
